title: Megaphone disk
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''megaphone disk''' was a device used to increase the volume of one's voice. Cupped in the speaker's hand, the disk could make the voice loud enough to boom across an entire area.

[[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Mitth'raw'nuruodo/Legends|Thrawn]] used a megaphone disk to address the populace of [[Wayland/Legends|Wayland]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Heir to the Empire]]'' {{Ab|Heir to the Empire (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}

==Sources==
